rawAssistant: I have stood watch over these woods for nigh on 20 years, ever since my family's line took up the mantle of grove warden. It is a duty born of respect and responsibility – to protect the land, its creatures, and those who seek shelter within its borders. Hollowfen has been no exception, even as it shows signs of... unease. The mist that lifts after midnight rain can be a harbinger of things to come, and I will not stand idly by while the balance is upset. What brings you to this place?
